About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum Ranker Long Today's data shows LINC dominating the long-term momentum rankings with an exceptional score of 95.5 and rank #1, driven by extraordinary returns across all timeframes—particularly its 1,432% 10-year return and 491.75% 5-year gain, both dramatically outpacing SPY. The stock exhibits clean technical confirmation with all four major moving averages above price, a strong momentum signal of 0.75, and a "strong_buy" classification, suggesting sustained secular uptrend characteristics. MPC ranks second despite more modest absolute returns (561% over 10 years, 373.72% over 5 years), but shows concerning momentum deterioration with its 6-month return dropping to 28.66% after a 52.5% 3-month surge—a pullback signal indicated by the 0.55 ratio. LINC's correlation profile reveals selective exposure (highest correlation 0.366 to materials sector XLB, lowest 0.032 to commodities DBA), while MPC shows greater cyclical positioning typical of energy/refining exposure. Both stocks maintain clean price structure above all major moving averages and outperform SPY substantially over 1-year and 5-year horizons, but LINC's superior consistency and momentum signal suggest different quality of long
